nasb.text: ‘Who is this that hides counsel without knowledge?’ Therefore I have declared that which I did not understand, Things too wonderful for me, which I did not know.

esv.text: ‘Who is this that hides counsel without knowledge?’ Therefore I have uttered what I did not understand, things too wonderful for me, which I did not know.

cnv.text: 這以無知無識的言語使　神的旨意模糊不清的是誰呢？ 所以我說了我所不明白的； 這些事太奇妙，是我不曉得的。

ccb.text: 你问，‘谁用无知的话使我的旨意晦暗不明？’ 诚然，我对自己所谈论的事一无所知， 这些事太奇妙，我无法明白。
